# `createTerminalPrompter`

Generated reference page for the `createTerminalPrompter` function export.

- Import: `dreamcli`
- Export kind: function
- Declared in: `src/core/prompt/index.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/prompt/index.ts:253`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/prompt/index.ts#L253)

## Signatures

```ts
function createTerminalPrompter(read: ReadFn, write: WriteFn): PromptEngine;
```

| Parameter | Type             | Description                                  |
| --------- | ---------------- | -------------------------------------------- |
| `read`    | `read: ReadFn`   | Line reader function (returns `null` on EOF) |
| `write`   | `write: WriteFn` | Output writer function                       |

## Examples

```ts
import { createInterface } from 'readline';

const rl = createInterface({ input: process.stdin, output: process.stdout });
const read = () =>
  new Promise<string | null>((resolve) => {
    rl.question('', (answer) => resolve(answer));
  });
const write: WriteFn = (s) => process.stdout.write(s);

const prompter = createTerminalPrompter(read, write);
```
